name: Easy Chrome
description: A Chrome extension with a floating navbar and refresh button

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:;
